articles.excerpt: World models and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) provide complementary capabilities for predicting future outcomes from static visual observations. World models can generate concrete visual rollouts of possible futures, while MLLMs can reason abstractly over questions, goals, and rules. However, generated rollouts are stochastic and may be visually plausible but task-incorrect, making it
articles.summary: 探讨世界模型与多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在静态视觉观测中预测未来的互补性：世界模型生成具体视觉推演，MLLM进行抽象推理。但推演随机且可能视觉合理而任务错误，需融合两种能力以提高预测准确性。

articles.title: ThoughtFold: Folding Reasoning Chains via Introspective Preference Learning
articles.excerpt: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have achieved remarkable progress thanks to Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) on Chain-of-Thoughts (CoTs). However, since long CoTs naturally contain trial and errors and mainstream RLVR approaches choose outcome-correct CoT trajectories for memorization, the redundant explorations in long CoTs are inevitably reinforced, which results in the over-t
articles.summary: 提出ThoughtFold，通过内省偏好学习折叠推理链。针对强化学习中长思维链CoT因结果正确而被记忆从而强化冗余探索的问题，该方法优化推理效率，减少无谓计算。

articles.title: Small RL Controller, Large Language Model: RL-Guided Adaptive Sampling for Test-Time Scaling
articles.excerpt: Test-time scaling improves the reasoning performance of large language models but incurs substantial cost in both total computation and latency. Existing adaptive sampling methods partially mitigate this issue by dynamically deciding when to stop sampling, yet they typically rely on heuristic rules or rely on distribution assumptions. In this work, we formulate adaptive sampling as a Markov decisi
articles.summary: 将自适应采样建模为马尔可夫决策过程，用小型RL控制器动态决定何时停止采样，避免启发式规则。在保持推理性能的同时，显著降低测试时计算成本和延迟。

articles.title: Language Models Need Sleep: Learning to Self-Modify and Consolidate Memories
articles.excerpt: The past few decades have witnessed significant advances in the design of machine learning algorithms, from early studies on task-specific shallow models to more general deep Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite showing promising results in tasks that require instant prediction or in-context learning, existing models lack the ability to continually learn and effectively transfer their temporal in
articles.summary: 提出让语言模型在离线阶段“睡眠”，通过自我修改与记忆巩固实现持续学习。模型可转移时序知识，弥补传统LLM无法持续积累经验的不足。

articles.title: Benchmarking Visual State Tracking in Multimodal Video Understanding
articles.excerpt: Understanding a video requires more than recognizing isolated moments, as humans continuously track entities, states, and events over time. This capacity for visual state tracking is fundamental to video understanding, yet remains underexplored in current evaluations of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs). We introduce Visual STAte Tracking benchmark (VSTAT), a video-based benchmark designed
articles.summary: 引入VSTAT基准，专门评估多模态大语言模型（MLLM）在视频中对实体、状态和事件的持续跟踪能力。揭示当前模型在视觉状态跟踪上的不足，推动视频理解研究。

articles.title: NVIDIA OmniDreams: Real-Time Generative World Model for Closed-Loop Autonomous Vehicle Simulation
articles.excerpt: As autonomous vehicle capabilities advance, the safe evaluation of driving policies in long-tail scenarios remains a critical bottleneck. In closed-loop simulation, the driving policy model actively interacts with the environment, where its actions dynamically update the simulator state and directly influence the next set of generated sensor observations. While recent reconstruction-based neural s
articles.summary: NVIDIA提出OmniDreams，一种实时生成式世界模型，用于自动驾驶闭环仿真。动态生成传感器观测，支持驾驶策略在长尾场景中的安全评估，克服了重建式神经模拟器的局限。

articles.title: Adaptive Auto-Harness: Sustained Self-Improvement for Agentic System Deployment on Open-Ended Task Streams
articles.excerpt: Auto-harness systems such as A-Evolve, GEPA, and Meta-Harness improve LLM agents by optimizing prompts, skills, tools, memories, and supporting infrastructure from execution feedback, but they are typically evaluated on fixed offline benchmarks. Real deployments instead present open-ended task streams: histories grow without a fixed endpoint, heterogeneous tasks require different harnesses, and pr
articles.summary: 针对开放任务流部署，提出自适应自动装备系统，无需固定基准。通过持续优化提示、技能和工具，使LLM代理在异构、无终点的任务序列中自我改进。

articles.title: RoboTrustBench: Benchmarking the Trustworthiness of Video World Models for Robotic Manipulation
articles.excerpt: Video world models are increasingly used in robotic manipulation, yet existing benchmarks mostly evaluate them under valid, feasible, and safe instructions. We introduce RoboTrustBench, a benchmark for evaluating the trustworthiness of video world models under four scenarios: Normal, Constraint-Sensitive, Counterfactual, and Adversarial. Built from real-world DROID episodes, RoboTrustBench contain
articles.summary: 提出RoboTrustBench基准，评估视频世界模型在机器人操作中的可信度。涵盖正常、约束敏感、反事实和对抗四类场景，基于真实DROID数据构建，共8K轨迹。

articles.title: Thinking in Blender: Staged Executable Inverse Graphics with Vision-Language Models
articles.excerpt: Inverse graphics is a longstanding and highly underconstrained problem that seeks to reconstruct images as editable 3D scenes which can be rendered, relit, and manipulated. In this work, we investigate whether pretrained vision-language models (VLMs) can perform executable inverse graphics directly from a single image by reconstructing a scene as an editable Blender program, without relying on spe
articles.summary: 利用预训练视觉语言模型（VLM）直接从单张图像重建可编辑的Blender程序，实现可执行逆图形。无需专用训练数据，支持渲染、重新照明和操控。

articles.title: K-BrowseComp: A Web Browsing Agent Benchmark Grounded in Korean Contexts

We introduce K-BrowseComp, a web-browsing agent benchmark grounded in Korean contexts, consisting of 400 problems. The 300-problem K-BrowseComp-Verified subset is manually constructed and validated by nat
articles.summary: 推出K-BrowseComp，基于韩语环境的网页浏览代理基准，包含400个问题。其中300个手工构建并验证，填补了韩语智能体基准稀缺的空白。

articles.title: A Local Perturbation Theory for Cross-Domain Interference and Recovery in Multi-Domain RL
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training improves large language models (LLMs) on individual domains such as mathematical reasoning, code generation, question answering, and creative writing (CW), but training on one domain often degrades performance on others. Existing explanations based on catastrophic forgetting or global gradient conflict are incomplete: substantial interference can occur eve
articles.summary: 提出局部扰动理论，解释多域RL后训练中跨领域干扰与恢复机制。指出即使梯度冲突小，局部表示变化仍能引起显著干扰，为多任务学习提供新视角。

articles.title: Policy and World Modeling Co-Training for Language Agents
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) improves large language model (LLM) agents by teaching them which actions lead to high rewards, but provides little supervision on what those actions do to the environment. World modeling (WM) can fill this gap, yet existing approaches often require separate simulators, extra training stages, or additional inference-time computation. We observe that on-policy RL rollout
articles.summary: 在强化学习rollout中同时训练策略与世界模型，无需额外仿真器或计算。利用on-policy数据学习动作的环境效应，提升LLM代理对动态的理解与控制。

articles.title: Harness-1: Reinforcement Learning for Search Agents with State-Externalizing Harnesses
articles.excerpt: Search agents are often trained as policies over growing transcripts: the model must decide how to search while also remembering what it has seen, which evidence is useful, which constraints remain open, and which claims have actually been checked. We argue that this formulation puts too much routine state management inside the policy: reinforcement learning is forced to optimize both semantic sea
articles.summary: 提出Harness-1，通过将状态管理外化到装备中，简化搜索代理的强化学习。让策略专注于语义搜索决策，而非记忆证据和约束，提升训练效率与稳定性。

articles.excerpt: 欧委会在上周五的磋商后表示，欧盟当前与中国的贸易和投资关系“不可持续”，需要采取果断和一致的措施。然而，若要制定新的贸易保护措施，欧委会必须得到德国及其它欧盟国家的支持。北京方面已立即发出警告。

articles.title: 德语媒体：中国应该转让技术换取市场准入
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/德语媒体：中国应该转让技术换取市场准入/a-77378325?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 欧盟委员会认为同中国的贸易与投资关系“不可持续”，但在采取怎样有效措施上各方存在分歧。有德媒认为，配额和关税已无法阻止中国的科技进步，现在到了以市场换取技术转让的时候了。

articles.title: “天安门母亲”呼吁习近平秉持胡耀邦精神“有错必纠”

articles.title: 这场“香会”带给人们哪些信息和启示？

articles.title: 墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/墙外文摘：台湾并非中美关系的核心问题/a-77363277?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 有研究者认为，台湾并非中美关系的核心问题。核心问题是中共的专制意识形态与自由世界民主原则之间不可调和的冲突。台湾只是暴露并放大了这一矛盾。
